---
title: "Extraction"
author: Einar Hjörleifsson
description: ""
date: "2026-03-02"
categories: [code, rtip]
echo: true
---

Mearl extraction is licenced at 9 sites in 3 fjords in the NW of Iceland, the total area being 6.6 km^2 (reference). Based on AIS data analysis, extraction since 2009 has been limited to 2 areas in Arnarfjörður, the area being a total of 2.2 km^2.

```{r, eval = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(duckdbfs)
library(sf)
kalk <- 
  # gisland::gl_os_leyfi() |> # not woking at the moment
  read_sf(here::here("os2.gpkg")) |> 
  st_make_valid() |> 
   filter(vidfangsefni %in% c("Kalkþörungaset"),
         gistegund_leyfis == "Nýtingarleyfi",
          sgildi == "Í gildi") |> 
  arrange(desc(gildir_til)) |>
  distinct(geom, .keep_all = TRUE) |> 
  mutate(fjord = c(rep("Ísafjarðardjúp", 2), "Miðfjörður", rep("Arnarfjörður", 6)),
         area = as.numeric(st_area(geom)) / 1e6) |> 
  mutate(id = 1:n()) 
kalk |> 
  st_drop_geometry() |> 
  group_by(fjord) |> 
  summarise(n = n(),
         area = sum(area)) 
kalk |> 
  st_drop_geometry() |> 
  
  filter(id %in% 5:6) |> pull(area) |> sum()
library(mapview)
mapview(kalk, zcol = "id")

kalk |>  mutate(id = 1:n()) |> select(id, fjord, area) |> write_sf("tmp.gpkg")
kalk <- open_dataset("tmp.gpkg")
stk <- open_dataset("/u3/geo/fishydata/data/ais/trail")


stk |> 
  dplyr::mutate(geom = ST_POINT(lon, lat)) |> 
  duckdbfs::spatial_join(kalk, by = "st_intersects", join = "left") |> 
  filter(!is.na(id)) |> 
  collect() ->
  d

d |> st_drop_geometry() |> count(id)



d |> 
  filter(.cid > 0) |> 
  filter(vid %in% c(1473, 1402, 3031, 1894)) |>
  filter(!is.na(id)) |> 
  filter(speed < 0.5) |> 
  mutate(date = floor_date(time, "month")) |> 
  group_by(date, vid, id, fjord) |> 
  summarise(dt = sum(dt, na.rm = TRUE) / 3600) |> 
  ggplot(aes(date, dt, colour = as.factor(vid))) +
  geom_point() +
  facet_wrap(~ id + fjord)


stk |> 
  filter(.cid > 0) |> 
  filter(vid %in% c(1473, 1402, 3031, 1894)) |> 
  collect() |> 
  mutate(speed = ifelse(speed > 15, 15, speed)) |> 
  ramb::rb_mapdeck(radius = 50)

d |> count(vid) |> arrange(desc(n))
stk |> 
  #filter(vid %in% c(1473)) |> #, 1402, 3031, 1894)) |> 
  filter(vid %in% c(1402)) |> #, 1402, 3031, 1894)) |> 
  collect() |> 
  mutate(speed = ifelse(speed > 15, 15, speed)) |> 
  select(lon, lat, speed) |> 
  ramb::rb_mapdeck(radius = 50)




os2 <- os |> st_cast("GEOMETRYCOLLECTION")
os2 |> st_geometry_type(by_geometry = FALSE)
os2 |> st_geometry_type(by_geometry = FALSE)

os |> glimpse()
os |> st_cast("GEOMETRYCOLLECTION") |> glimpse()
os |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  st_cast("GEOMETRYCOLLECTION") |> st_cast("POLYGON")
library(sf)
st_collection_extract(os, "POLYGON")


os_poly <- st_collection_extract(os2, "POLYGON")  # polygonal parts
# optionally normalize to MULTIPOLYGON
os_mp   <- st_cast(os_poly, "MULTIPOLYGON")

st_geometry_type(os, by_geometry = FALSE)
# likely returns "MULTISURFACE"

# Convert MULTISURFACE -> MULTIPOLYGON
x2 <- st_cast(os, "MULTIPOLYGON", warn = FALSE)

st_geometry_type(x2, by_geometry = FALSE)
  
  
os$geom
os2 <- os |> st_drop_geometry()
os |> filter(vidfangsefni == "Kalkþörungaset") |> glimpse()
os2 |> mutate(landsjor = str_trim(landsjor)) |> 
  count(landsjor)
os2 |> 
  mutate(landsjor = str_trim(landsjor)) |> 
  filter(landsjor == "Á hafsbotni") |> 
  count(vidfangsefni, tegundleyfis)

```
